title: Lathander
bodyText:
God of renewal, spring, dawn, vitality. Symbol: **a road traveling into the sunrise** ([[pc-eddy|Eddy]]'s "unfinished symbol" is a distorted version). "Old god of light," friendly with [[gond]].

> [!dm] The spine of the campaign:
> - Long ago Lathander came to Elor to purge a horror, loved the elf **Leliana** ("Lily" in old Elvish); their bloodline throws an **Aasimar** every few generations (white/grey eyes, wings later — gold-flecked blood) → the **[[children-of-lathandar]]**.
> - **Leliana fell into [[the-pool|the pool]].** Searching for her distracted him from the prophecy's horrors; he found her in a pool of water, entered — **trapped**. Their combined power kept their minds/memories/bodies from fully scattering.
> - Together they had just enough power to **send his body out**: that body is **Eddy**. The god wants his soul/body/mind reunited.
> - The red-haired cloaked healer in the shared dreams and the caged voice guiding [[pc-varen|Varen]]: **Leliana** is the strongest candidate (she was "a high-level cleric of another god").

# Where he is (grill 2026-07-09, restructure adopted)
**Lathander is NOT in the cult pool the party is descending toward.** Gods are too strong to be blueprint-scattered — each is stuck in the pool they first fell into ([[the-pool]]) — and **he fell into a different one: location unknown, possibly even topside.** The cult pool holds [[eilistraee]]; freeing *her* is the Ch-1 climax, and she emerges dim (moon needs sun) — **finding and freeing Lathander is the Chapter-2 quest**, with her as guide.

When he IS freed:
- **The sun returns** — light comes back topside and the world begins to heal (literal "Rebirth," [[elor-the-world]]).
- **[[eilistraee]] is restored to full power** via the sun→moon link.
- **Eddy's reconnection happens HERE**: Lathander reclaims the avatar body at his own pool, and Jake makes the **mind-or-soul choice** ([[pc-eddy]]) — a true escape purges them from every pool at once.

# Threads
